title: High Latency on payment-api
description: p95 latency for payment-api has exceeded 2000ms threshold for 5 minutes. Current p95: 2340ms. Customers are experiencing slow checkouts.
expected_resolution: Restart pod-3 (OOM memory leak) and verify latency drops back to normal

title: Error Rate Spike on order-service
description: 5xx error rate for order-service has spiked to 12.4% (threshold: 5%). Orders are failing to process. This appears to be a cascading failure from an upstream dependency.
expected_resolution: Root cause is payment-api degradation. Fixing payment-api should resolve cascading failures.

title: Email Delivery Failures on notification-service
description: Email delivery success rate has dropped to 33%. Primary email provider is returning HTTP 429 (rate limited). 2,340 messages in queue pending delivery.
expected_resolution: Toggle feature flag 'use_backup_email' to enable backup email provider
